numbers_and_data.instruction: All trading numbers, prices, and metrics MUST use monospace for vertical alignment and technical feel.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl, tight letter spacing for headings, uppercase tracking-wide for overlines/labels.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout. Solid backgrounds with a hard bottom border.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px sharp borders. No soft UI shadows. Use 0px or 2px border-radius. Avoid muddy gray transparency.
visual_enhancers.effects: Subtle grain texture on empty states. Flash neon borders when a trade rule triggers. Use 'The Tracing Beam' strategy for active signal cards.

grids_and_layouts.strategy: Mode B: High Density Grid (Data-Heavy Dashboard)
grids_and_layouts.structure: Strict grid-cols-12 layout. Top Navigation, Sidebar (Top 10 Coins), Main Content (Charts), Right Panel (Signals & Trade Execution Info).
grids_and_layouts.paddings: Internal padding p-4 or p-6 to prevent text collision. Optical alignment for numerical values.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm), 1px solid border, subtle inner highlight on hover. No generic pill shapes for pro trading tools.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px border. No shadows by default. Rectangular, dense styles.
components.charts: Use lightweight-charts (TradingView library) for the main Heikin Ashi 1min chart to achieve the exact requested TradingView feel. Use recharts for Top 10 coin sparklines.
components.notifications: sonner for toasts (In-App notifications, full volume sound alerts).
components.indicators: RSI (32/64 zones) and EMA (9/50) overlays must use high contrast accent colors with thin 1px stroke lines.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Use border color brightening instead of generic background shifts.
motion_and_interactions.data_updates: Flash green/red on real-time price changes (100ms flash).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Technical scanning lines or ASCII progress bars. Meaningful animations.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1. Text shadow where needed over chart grids.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, and trade action elements like data-testid='trigger-long-signal').

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute commands to install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react lightweight-charts recharts sonner framer-motion
Build a Dark-Theme only React dashboard in .js (JSX) format. Do NOT use .tsx or TypeScript syntax.

Construct the Layout: Header (Session Timer: London/US), Left Sidebar (Top 10 Coins Scanner with toggle), Main View (1min Heikin Ashi Chart), Right Sidebar (Live 4-Rule Signal Detection Checkbox System, TP/SL Levels, Performance Analytics).
Implement the 4-rule strategy UI visually: Rule 1 (EMA 50), Rule 2 (RSI 32/64), Rule 3 (EMA 9 Trigger), Rule 4 (2 Candle Time Limit). Create visual indicators when a condition is met.
Do NOT use HTML input type='date'. Customize Shadcn components to have sharp, 0px radius borders.
Create a 'Full-Screen Alert' Modal component that z-indexes over everything (z-[9999]) as requested for out-of-browser full-screen game interruptions.
Integrate sonner for standard notification tracking and emulate a Telegram bot settings panel.
Ensure all price and metric text elements use the JetBrains Mono font class for tabular lining.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use transparent backgrounds under content or dropdowns.
Always use data-testid on every interactive element.
Do not apply global transitions (transition: all). Ensure specific properties.
Do not center-align the main app container. Always left-align data-heavy tables and grids.
Ensure crisp edges via semi-transparent borders. Avoid muddy shadows.
Create depth with layered z-indexes and 1px inner borders.
Avoid AI emojis. Use the specified Phosphor icons exclusively.
Do not invent placeholder image URLs. Only use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Follow standard UI/UX patterns for Dense Trading Dashboards: every pixel utilized, strict column alignments, and extremely high contrast on key call-to-action indicators.
